implementation_plan.overview: Offload isomorphic-git statusMatrix() from main Electron thread to a persistent worker_threads Worker. Add repo-size guard (.git/index > 5MB triggers native git fallback), statusMatrix cache, circuit breaker for worker crashes, and timing instrumentation. First worker_threads usage in codebase.

steps.description: Create IGitStatusWorker interface with GitWorkerRequest, GitStatusStrategy types, and execute/clearCache/terminate/isAlive methods
steps.rationale: Interface-first design following codebase pattern (IGitWatcherService, IGitPollingService). Enables DI and test mocking.

steps.description: Add GIT_STATUS constants section to shared constants (INDEX_SIZE_THRESHOLD, NATIVE_GIT_TIMEOUT, NATIVE_GIT_MAX_BUFFER, CIRCUIT_BREAKER_MAX_CRASHES, CIRCUIT_BREAKER_WINDOW_MS)
steps.rationale: Constants needed by both worker script and service. Follows existing SCREENSHOT/CAMERA/TRANSCRIPTION pattern.

steps.description: Create git-status.worker.ts with parentPort message handler, isomorphic-git strategy (statusMatrix with cache), native-git strategy (execFile + porcelain parser), and clear-cache handler. Export parsePorcelainOutput as named export for testability.
steps.rationale: Core worker that runs both strategies off main thread. Porcelain parser exported separately for unit testing without spawning workers.

steps.description: Add worker entry point to electron.vite.config.ts rollupOptions.input so it bundles as git-status.worker.js
steps.rationale: NFR-006 requires worker bundled as separate entry point. Path resolves via __dirname in both dev and ASAR.

steps.description: Create GitStatusWorkerAdapter implementing IGitStatusWorker. Wraps worker_threads.Worker with lazy creation, request/response correlation via incrementing IDs, error/exit event handling, and restart-on-next-call semantics.
steps.rationale: Adapter pattern isolates worker_threads details. Constructor accepts optional workerPath for test injection.

steps.description: Refactor GitStatusService: add constructor DI for IGitStatusWorker (defaults to GitStatusWorkerAdapter), add selectStrategy() with .git/index size guard, add resolveGitPath() with which/where, add circuit breaker state (Map<string, {crashes, disabled}>), add dispose() method, update executeGetStatus() to delegate to worker, re-export GIT_INDEX_SIZE_THRESHOLD and GitStatusStrategy for spec compliance
steps.rationale: Core refactor. Preserves operation queue, changes only the execution path from direct isomorphic-git calls to worker delegation.

steps.description: Wire gitStatusService.dispose() in app before-quit handler in src/main/index.ts. Import gitStatusService singleton.
steps.rationale: AC-011: Worker cleanup on shutdown. Follows existing dispose pattern for fileWatcherService, directoryWatcherService, etc.

steps.description: Minor update to git-handlers.ts imports if needed (verify GitStatusService type still works for DI parameter)
steps.rationale: Ensure DI parameter type is compatible with refactored GitStatusService.

steps.description: Create porcelain parser unit tests in git-status.worker.test.ts. Test all XY code mappings, NUL splitting, GIT_STATUS_CAP, empty output, unknown codes.
steps.rationale: Pure function tests, no worker spawning needed. High confidence in parser correctness.

steps.description: Create GitStatusWorkerAdapter unit tests. Mock worker_threads.Worker. Test lazy creation, message correlation, error handling, terminate, clearCache, restart semantics.
steps.rationale: NFR-005: Mock worker interface for unit tests.

steps.description: Update GitStatusService.test.ts: replace isomorphic-git module mocks with mock IGitStatusWorker injection. Keep all existing test assertions unchanged (AC-010). Add new test sections for strategy selection, circuit breaker, dispose, and git path resolution.
steps.rationale: AC-010: Existing test assertions must pass. Test setup changes but output expectations are identical.

patterns_to_follow: Interface in src/main/interfaces/ with JSDoc (IGitWatcherService, IGitPollingService pattern)
Constants in src/shared/constants.ts as readonly object (SCREENSHOT, CAMERA pattern)
async dispose(): Promise<void> with idempotent behavior (GitWatcherService pattern)
Constructor DI with default singleton (registerGitHandlers pattern)
execFile with array args, no shell: true (LocalWhisperService pattern)
Logger with structured context objects (logger.info('prefix:', { key: value }))
Factory function for service creation (createGitStatusService pattern)
patterns_to_avoid: Module-level side effects in worker (use parentPort.on('message'))
Synchronous file I/O in main thread

file_changes.description: Worker interface with execute(), clearCache(), terminate(), isAlive() methods and GitWorkerRequest/GitStatusStrategy types
Add GIT_STATUS constants section (INDEX_SIZE_THRESHOLD, NATIVE_GIT_TIMEOUT, NATIVE_GIT_MAX_BUFFER, circuit breaker params)
Worker thread script: handles isomorphic-git and native-git strategies, porcelain parser, cache management
Add rollupOptions.input with worker entry point for separate bundling
IGitStatusWorker implementation wrapping worker_threads.Worker with lazy creation and request correlation
Major refactor: DI constructor, strategy selection, circuit breaker, dispose(), delegate to worker
Minor import verification for refactored GitStatusService
Porcelain parser unit tests covering all XY codes, edge cases
Adapter unit tests with mocked worker_threads.Worker
Switch to mock IGitStatusWorker injection, preserve assertions, add strategy/circuit-breaker tests

key_scenarios: Porcelain parser maps all XY codes correctly (M , _M, MM, A , AM, D , _D, ??, !!, UU, AA, DD, AU, UA, DU, UD)
Porcelain parser handles NUL-delimited output and GIT_STATUS_CAP
Worker adapter creates worker lazily on first execute()
Worker adapter correlates requests/responses by ID
Worker adapter handles worker crash (error event) and marks as not alive
Worker adapter restarts worker on next execute() after crash
Worker adapter terminate() resolves pending promises with error
GitStatusService selects isomorphic-git for small repos
GitStatusService selects native-git when .git/index > 5MB and git available
GitStatusService falls back to isomorphic-git when git not available (AC-006)
GitStatusService circuit breaker activates after 3 crashes in 60s (AC-013)
GitStatusService dispose() terminates worker and clears state
All existing GitStatusService.test.ts assertions pass unchanged (AC-010)
All existing git-handlers.test.ts assertions pass unchanged (AC-010)

risks.risk: Worker bundling path resolution differs between dev and ASAR production builds
risks.mitigation: Log resolved worker path at debug level. Test both npm run dev and npm run build:mac. Fall back to main-thread execution if worker creation fails (NFR-003).

risks.risk: isomorphic-git fs module in worker thread may behave differently than in main thread (ASAR patching)
risks.mitigation: Worker operates on real filesystem (.git/ directories), not ASAR contents. fs module in worker is standard Node.js fs. No ASAR conflict expected.

risks.risk: Test migration complexity: existing tests mock isomorphic-git at module level, refactored service delegates to worker
risks.mitigation: Mock IGitStatusWorker.execute() to return same GitStatusResponse objects. Assertion lines remain identical per AC-010.

risks.risk: which command not available on Windows
risks.mitigation: Add platform check: process.platform === 'win32' ? 'where' : 'which'. Low priority since codebase is macOS-focused.

risks.risk: electron-vite externalizeDeps may not work correctly with worker entry point (isomorphic-git bundling)
risks.mitigation: externalizeDeps defaults to true for main process. isomorphic-git is already externalized. Worker inherits same behavior. Verify with build test.

verification_criteria: npm run test passes with all existing + new tests green
npm run dev starts without errors, git status works in UI
Log output shows GitStatus: strategy completed in Xms format
dispose() terminates worker thread (no orphan processes)
Circuit breaker activates after 3 crashes in 60s (test verified)
No changes to src/shared/ipc/git-schema.ts or src/preload/
git-handlers.test.ts passes without any assertion changes
